design_philosophy: Premium, minimal, modern Düsseldorf luxury business aesthetic. Inspired by Königsallee, editorial finance brands, high-end property marketing. Calm, confident, high-trust presentation. Architectural journal meets private banking. No generic portal look, no crowded cards.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight leading-none
rules.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight leading-tight
rules.overline: uppercase text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#7A7A7A]

layout.spacing: Generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for main sections. p-8 to p-12 for bento grids.
patterns: Bento Grid for features/services with gap-6 or gap-8
Asymmetric split sections (e.g., Image 70% left, text 30% right)
Horizontal scroll section for References gallery

animations.scroll: Sections fade + rise (y: 40 to 0) into viewport. Service titles slide from left, copy from right.
animations.parallax: UseScroll from Framer Motion on full-width images. Image moves slower than container.
animations.numbers: Count up statistics on scroll view.
animations.hover_image: Image reveal effect: images wipe in behind a sliding color overlay when entering viewport.
animations.cursor: Custom dot cursor with mix-blend-mode: difference that expands when hovering over images/cards.
animations.navigation: Shrinks and becomes translucent on scroll.
animations.page_transitions: Smooth fade or slide page transitions using framer-motion AnimatePresence.

components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism on scroll (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F8F6F2]/80). Minimalist desktop nav, elegant mobile menu.
components.buttons: Flat solid background (#0A0A0A), white text, rounded-none or rounded-sm, slight hover lift and bg change to graphite (#333333).
components.cards: No visible generic borders. Use subtle background shifts or 1px very light border (#E5E5E5). Images should have hover zoom.
components.forms: Floating labels, minimal borders (border-b only or very subtle full border), no generic Shadcn default look.
components.whatsapp_widget: Floating action button in bottom right corner.
components.map: OpenStreetMap integration centered on Königsallee 98, 40212 Düsseldorf.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Lenis for smooth scrolling globally. This is critical for the premium editorial feel.
2. Build a CustomCursor component tracking mouse position with framer-motion, set mix-blend-mode: difference. Provide hover states for images/links.
3. Create a StaggeredText component for the Hero section that splits text by word/character and animates them sliding up with an overflow-hidden mask.
4. For the 'Referenzen' gallery, use a Horizontal Scroll section (framer-motion useScroll and useTransform) so user scrolls down but content moves left.
5. Create an ImageReveal component for images entering the viewport: a solid overlay (e.g. #D9D0C1 or #F8F6F2) slides away to reveal the image.
6. Build a floating WhatsApp widget and integrate an OpenStreetMap view for Königsallee 98, 40212 Düsseldorf.
7. Implement animated statistic counters that count up when scrolled into view.
8. Navigation should have a clear, minimal state at top, and shrink into a translucent sticky bar on scroll.
9. Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react for minimalist iconography.
10. MUST include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements.
11. Pages to build: Startseite, Leistungen, Über uns, Referenzen, Karriere, Kontakt, Rechtliches. Use React Router with AnimatePresence for smooth transitions.
